# Create (empty) Markdown files for each content page

While failed request to non-existing content pages causes no harm locally, this is not the case for the deployed version on GitHub pages: https://neomjs.com/node_modules/neo.mjs/apps/portal/

The ticket can get resolved once each tree item has an empty file (e.g. just a title).
